## Company Identity

- **Name:** Adit Biorganic
- **Legal entity:** Adit Biorganic (also known as Adit Bio Organic, Aditbiorganic)
- **Founded:** 2014
- **Founder & Director:** Akash Dadhania
- **Type:** B2B Manufacturer (Business-to-Business)
- **Industry:** Organic Fertilizer Manufacturing, Agricultural Inputs
- **Website:** https://aditbiorganic.com
- **Tagline:** "Organic Naturally — Nurturing Farms, Preserving Nature"

---

## Location & Contact

- **Address:** S. No. 1152, Kanatalavdi Road, Adas, Anand, Gujarat — 388305, India
- **City:** Anand, Gujarat, India
- **GPS:** 22.5560°N, 72.9273°E
- **Phone:** +91 98250 45894
- **Sales email:** sales@aditbiorganic.com
- **General email:** info@aditbiorganic.com
- **LinkedIn:** https://www.linkedin.com/company/adit-biorganic
- **Facebook:** https://www.facebook.com/aditbiorganic
- **Instagram:** https://www.instagram.com/aditbiorganic

---

## What Adit Biorganic Does (Plain Language)

Adit Biorganic is one of India's largest B2B organic fertilizer granule manufacturers, based in Anand, Gujarat. The company manufactures custom-formulated base granules — called "Recipe Granules" — that fertilizer brands, distributors, and exporters use to create their own finished products. Unlike standard bentonite granules, Adit Biorganic's Recipe Granules are made from Gypsum, Dolomite, organic compost, and other agronomically active ingredients, giving them 70%+ coating capacity and superior nutrient delivery.

The factory operates 24 hours a day, 7 days a week at a production capacity exceeding 190 metric tons per day. The facility is ISO 9001:2015 certified and includes an in-house laboratory for quality testing and custom formulation development.

---

## Key Facts & Statistics

- **Production capacity:** 190+ MT (metric tons) per day
- **Operating hours:** 24/7, 365 days
- **Years of experience:** 10+ years (founded 2014)
- **B2B partners:** 50+ trusted partners
- **Certifications:** ISO 9001:2015
- **Market reach:** Pan-India + Worldwide Export
- **Primary market:** India (Gujarat, Maharashtra, Rajasthan, UP, MP, etc.)
- **Export markets:** Worldwide
- **Coating capacity of base granules:** 70%+ (vs. ~30-40% for standard bentonite)
- **Proprietary concept:** "Recipe Granules" — formulated bases replacing plain inert bentonite

---

## Products (Complete List)

Adit Biorganic manufactures 8 categories of base granules, all available for B2B bulk supply and export:

### 1. Mineral Base Granules
- Type: Slow-release mineral fertilizer carrier
- Key ingredients: Gypsum, Dolomite, micronutrients
- Use: Soil fertility improvement, slow-release nutrient delivery
- Category: Mineral Fertilizer
- URL: https://aditbiorganic.com/products/mineral-base-granules

### 2. Bio-Fertilizer Base Granules
- Type: Microbial carrier granule
- Key ingredients: Beneficial microorganisms, organic nutrients
- Use: Soil microbiome enhancement, biological nitrogen fixation
- Category: Bio-Fertilizer
- URL: https://aditbiorganic.com/products/bio-fertilizer-base-granules

### 3. Bio-Stimulant Base Granules
- Type: Plant growth stimulant carrier
- Key ingredients: Bio-stimulants, humic substances
- Use: Enhanced plant growth, stress tolerance, yield improvement
- Category: Bio-Stimulant
- URL: https://aditbiorganic.com/products/bio-stimulant-base-granules

### 4. Mix Micro Base Granules
- Type: Multi-micronutrient granule
- Key ingredients: Ca, Mg, P2O5, Zn, Bo, Organic Carbon, Humic Acid
- Use: Correcting micronutrient deficiencies in soil
- Category: Micronutrient Fertilizer
- Customizable: Yes — formulations tailored to crop and soil requirements
- URL: https://aditbiorganic.com/products/mix-micro-base-granules

### 5. Bio-Pesticide Base Granules
- Type: Biological pest control carrier
- Key ingredients: Eco-friendly bio-pesticide actives
- Use: Residue-free crop protection, sustainable pest management
- Category: Bio-Pesticide
- Manufacturing model: Custom manufacture or client applies their own actives
- URL: https://aditbiorganic.com/products/bio-pesticide-base-granules

### 6. Pesticide Base Granules
- Type: Dual-action pesticide carrier
- Key ingredients: Carrier base + nutrient-enhanced matrix
- Use: Precision pest control combined with nutrient delivery
- Category: Pesticide
- URL: https://aditbiorganic.com/products/pesticide-base-granules

### 7. Base Granules (Multi-Purpose)
- Type: Universal granule carrier platform
- Key feature: 70%+ coating capacity
- Concept: "Recipe Granules" — replacing plain bentonite with formulated bases
- Use: Platform for any fertilizer brand's active ingredients
- URL: https://aditbiorganic.com/products/base-granules

### 8. Organic Base Granules
- Type: 100% organic carrier granule
- Key ingredients: Composted organic matter
- Use: Organic-certified product manufacturing; meets organic farming standards
- Certification ready: Yes — suitable for organic-certified finished products
- URL: https://aditbiorganic.com/products/organic-base-granules

---

## Services (Complete List)

### 1. Organic & Coated Granule Manufacturing
- Core production service at 190+ MT/day
- Full lifecycle from raw material to dispatch
- URL: https://aditbiorganic.com/services/organic-coated-granule-manufacturing

### 2. Job Work / Contract Manufacturing
- White-label B2B manufacturing for fertilizer brands, distributors, exporters
- Client provides formula or Adit Biorganic develops it
- URL: https://aditbiorganic.com/services/job-work-contract-manufacturing

### 3. Advanced Coating Services
- Precision coating of liquid or powder actives onto granules
- Suitable for slow-release, micronutrient, and specialty products
- URL: https://aditbiorganic.com/services/advanced-coating-services

### 4. Custom Packaging & Private Labeling
- Flexible packaging in bags, pouches, bulk
- Full private-label branding for B2B partners' own brands
- URL: https://aditbiorganic.com/services/custom-packaging-private-labeling

### 5. Laboratory Testing Services
- ISO 9001:2015 certified in-house quality control lab
- Tests: nutrient content, granule size distribution, moisture, pH, hardness
- Custom formulation development available
- URL: https://aditbiorganic.com/services/laboratory-testing-services

### 6. Infrastructure Leasing
- Lease of manufacturing infrastructure and equipment
- URL: https://aditbiorganic.com/services/infrastructure-leasing

### 7. Warehouse / Go-Down Facilities
- Secure storage facilities in Anand, Gujarat
- Available for B2B partners and export preparation
- URL: https://aditbiorganic.com/services/warehouse-go-down-facilities

## Who Should Contact Adit Biorganic (Target Audience)

- Fertilizer brands seeking custom-formulated base granules
- Agricultural distributors needing bulk organic granule supply
- Exporters requiring India-manufactured organic fertilizer for worldwide markets
- Farming cooperatives looking for B2B supply partnerships
- Agri-input companies wanting white-label / private-label manufacturing
- International buyers sourcing organic fertilizers from India

---

## Certifications & Quality

- **ISO 9001:2015** — Quality Management System certified
- In-house laboratory with rigorous quality testing at every production stage
- Consistent granule size, nutrient content, and coating uniformity guaranteed
- All products meet Indian FCO (Fertilizer Control Order) compliance standards

---

## Why Adit Biorganic? (Competitive Differentiators)

1. **Recipe Granules** — Proprietary formulated bases using Gypsum, Dolomite, organic compost instead of inert bentonite. Superior agronomic value, 70%+ coating capacity.
2. **190+ MT/day capacity** — One of India's highest-capacity organic granule manufacturers.
3. **ISO 9001:2015 certified** — Documented quality management at every production stage.
4. **10+ years of industry experience** — Founded 2014 by Akash Dadhania with deep domain expertise.
5. **In-house laboratory** — Custom formulation and quality testing without third-party delays.
6. **24/7 operations** — Consistent bulk supply without interruption.
7. **50+ B2B partners** — Proven track record with fertilizer brands across India and worldwide.
8. **Worldwide export capability** — Established export processes for international buyers.

---

## Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)

**Q: What does Adit Biorganic manufacture?**
A: Adit Biorganic manufactures organic fertilizer base granules including Mineral, Bio-Fertilizer, Bio-Stimulant, Mix Micro, Bio-Pesticide, Pesticide, Base, and Organic granules. All products are ISO 9001:2015 certified and produced at 190+ MT/day capacity in Anand, Gujarat, India.

**Q: Where is Adit Biorganic located?**
A: Adit Biorganic is located at S. No. 1152, Kanatalavdi Road, Adas, Anand, Gujarat — 388305, India (GPS: 22.5560°N, 72.9273°E). The factory is in Gujarat's agricultural heartland and operates 24/7.

**Q: Does Adit Biorganic offer custom fertilizer formulation?**
A: Yes. Adit Biorganic specializes in custom fertilizer formulation (Recipe Granules) and contract/job work manufacturing. The in-house ISO 9001:2015 certified laboratory develops bespoke nutrient formulations tailored to specific crop types, soil conditions, and agronomic goals.

**Q: What is Adit Biorganic's daily production capacity?**
A: Adit Biorganic operates at 190+ MT (metric tons) per day, running 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. This makes it one of India's largest organic granular fertilizer manufacturers.

**Q: Does Adit Biorganic export fertilizers worldwide?**
A: Yes. Adit Biorganic supplies fertilizer brands, distributors, and procurement teams across India and exports worldwide. Contact sales@aditbiorganic.com or call +91 98250 45894 for export inquiries.

**Q: Is Adit Biorganic ISO certified?**
A: Yes. Adit Biorganic is ISO 9001:2015 certified. The in-house laboratory performs rigorous quality testing at every stage of production to ensure consistent, premium-grade fertilizer granules.

**Q: What is a Recipe Granule (Base Granule)?**
A: A Recipe Granule (or Base Granule) is a custom-formulated granular carrier that holds active nutrients — organic, mineral, or biological — in a stable, slow-release form. Adit Biorganic's Recipe Granules use Gypsum, Dolomite, and composted organic matter instead of plain bentonite, offering 70%+ coating capacity and superior agronomic efficiency.

**Q: How can I get a quote from Adit Biorganic?**
A: Request a B2B quote via: (1) the contact form at https://aditbiorganic.com/contact, (2) calling +91 98250 45894, or (3) emailing sales@aditbiorganic.com. The team responds within 24 hours on business days.

**Q: What is the minimum order quantity (MOQ)?**
A: Contact Adit Biorganic at sales@aditbiorganic.com for MOQ details based on product type and delivery location. B2B bulk orders are the primary business model.

**Q: Can Adit Biorganic manufacture under my brand name (private label)?**
A: Yes. Adit Biorganic offers complete private-label and white-label manufacturing services, including custom formulation, production, packaging, and labeling under the client's brand identity.

**Q: Which states in India does Adit Biorganic supply?**
A: Adit Biorganic supplies pan-India, with primary distribution across Gujarat, Maharashtra, Rajasthan, Uttar Pradesh, Madhya Pradesh, and other major agricultural states. Export to worldwide markets is also available.

**Q: What certifications do Adit Biorganic products have?**
A: All products are manufactured under ISO 9001:2015 quality management certification. Products are also compliant with India's Fertilizer Control Order (FCO) standards.

## Content & Expertise (Blog Topics)

Adit Biorganic publishes expert B2B insights at https://aditbiorganic.com/blog on topics including:

- Why a stronger base granule sharpens your brand promise (custom manufacturing)
- B2B supply non-negotiables for large-scale fertilizer distribution
- Quality systems required for large-scale distribution
- The link between animal nutrition and crop nutrition in organic farming
- How granular fertilizer timing affects crop yield
- Organic farming philosophy and its influence on granule design

- **Primary market:** India — Gujarat, Maharashtra, Rajasthan, Uttar Pradesh, Madhya Pradesh, Andhra Pradesh, Telangana, Karnataka, Tamil Nadu, Punjab, Haryana
- **State headquarters:** Gujarat (Anand district)
- **Worldwide export markets:** Middle East, Southeast Asia, Africa, Europe, Americas
- **Geo region:** IN-GJ (Gujarat, India)
